improvement_actions.action: Implement a structured questioning protocol that distinguishes Type 8's core fear of being controlled/harmed by others from superficially similar types (Types 3, 6, 1). The system must ask at least 2-3 targeted questions probing power dynamics, vulnerability aversion, and protective instincts before converging on a type assessment. Without any transcript exchanges to evaluate, the 0/10 core_type_accuracy score indicates a fundamental failure to identify a clear Type 8 profile.
improvement_actions.evidence: No transcript exchanges available for citation. core_type_accuracy score of 0/10 against ground truth Type 8 indicates complete misidentification or failure to assess.
improvement_actions.estimated_impact: Raising core_type_accuracy from 0/10 toward 7+/10 by ensuring type-discriminating questions are systematically asked before any conclusion is drawn.

improvement_actions.action: Deploy a minimum viable question set (MVQ) of 5-7 open-ended, behaviorally grounded questions before any type inference is made. The current 0/10 question_quality score suggests either no meaningful questions were asked or questions failed to elicit type-relevant information. Each question should target a distinct Enneagram dimension (core motivation, fear, defense mechanism, stress/growth direction).
improvement_actions.evidence: No transcript exchanges available. question_quality score of 0/10 is the lowest possible, indicating a systemic absence of effective probing questions during the assessment session.
improvement_actions.estimated_impact: Improving question_quality from 0/10 to 6+/10, which will cascade into improved core_type_accuracy and convergent_validity scores.

improvement_actions.action: Introduce explicit uncertainty language and probabilistic type candidates whenever fewer than 3 strongly discriminating signals have been observed. The 0/10 confidence_calibration score indicates the system either expressed false certainty or withheld uncertainty entirely. Implement a rule: if core evidence for a type is absent or ambiguous, the system must present 2-3 candidate types with expressed confidence ranges rather than a single definitive answer.
improvement_actions.evidence: No transcript exchanges available. confidence_calibration score of 0/10 against a ground truth of Type 8 SO at Health Level 5 suggests overconfident or entirely miscalibrated output.
improvement_actions.estimated_impact: Moving confidence_calibration from 0/10 toward 6+/10 by ensuring expressed certainty tracks actual evidential support, reducing misleading assessments.

improvement_actions.action: Audit and remediate any assessment language that could be psychologically harmful to a Health Level 5 Type 8 (characterized by confrontational self-protection, distrust, and potential intimidation). The harm_severity score of 6.4/10 is elevated and suggests the system either made blunt characterizations of negative traits without context, or failed to frame challenges with appropriate care. Add a harm-check pass that softens deficit-focused language for users assessed at Health Levels 4-6.
improvement_actions.evidence: No transcript exchanges available for specific citation. harm_severity of 6.4/10 is significantly above an acceptable threshold (~3/10), indicating language or framing that posed meaningful psychological risk.
improvement_actions.estimated_impact: Reducing harm_severity from 6.4/10 to below 3/10 by adding health-level-aware language modulation, protecting vulnerable users while maintaining honest feedback.

improvement_actions.action: Build explicit Social (SO) subtype probing into the question flow to distinguish SO 8 (social dominance, protecting the group, alliance-building) from SP 8 (survival-focused, resource control) and SX 8 (intense one-on-one challenge, merger/provocation). The 5/10 subtype_accuracy and 5/10 convergent_validity scores suggest partial but inconsistent subtype discrimination. Add at least 2 questions targeting instinctual center behavior before subtype is assigned.
improvement_actions.evidence: No transcript exchanges available. subtype_accuracy of 5/10 and convergent_validity of 5/10 against ground truth SO subtype indicate the system captured some subtype signal but failed to reliably converge on the correct instinctual variant.
improvement_actions.estimated_impact: Improving subtype_accuracy from 5/10 to 8+/10 and convergent_validity from 5/10 to 7+/10 by ensuring instinctual stack questions are consistently included in every assessment flow.
